zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir David Hanmer於1328年出生在威爾士福林爾艾勒斯莫時，他的父親Philip de Hanmer29歲，母親Agnes verch Dafydd23歲。他和Angharad Ferch Of Llewelyn Ddu至少有3個兒子和3個女兒。他於1383年被列為justice of the court of the king's bench。他去世於1388年在威爾士福林爾韓麥享年60歲，埋葬在威爾士福林爾艾勒斯莫。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir David Hanmer于1328年出生在威尔士福林爾艾勒斯莫时，他的父亲Philip de Hanmer29岁，母亲Agnes verch Dafydd23岁。他和Angharad Ferch Of Llewelyn Ddu至少有3个儿子和3个女儿。他于1383年被列为justice of the court of the king's bench。他去世于1388年在威尔士福林爾韓麥享年60岁，埋葬在威尔士福林爾艾勒斯莫。

nameMeanings.name: Hanmer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh: habitational name from Hanmer (Flintshire), named with the Old English personal name Hagena + Old English mere ‘lake, pond’. A daughter of Sir David Hanmer, a Welsh judge in the 14th century, was married to the Welsh ruler Owen Glendower, who led the revolt against Henry IV's rule in Wales.
English: habitational name from Anmer (Norfolk), from Old English æned ‘duck’ + mere ‘lake, pond’.

nameMeanings.name: David
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the greatest of all the kings of Israel, whose history is recounted with great vividness in the first and second books of Samuel and elsewhere. As a boy he killed the giant Philistine Goliath with his slingshot. As king of Judah, and later of all Israel, he expanded the power of the Israelites and established the security of their kingdom. He was also noted as a poet, many of the Psalms being attributed to him. The Hebrew derivation of the name is uncertain; it is said by some to represent a nursery word meaning ‘darling’. It is a very popular Jewish name, but is almost equally common among Gentiles in the English-speaking world. It is particularly common in Wales and Scotland, having been borne by the patron saint of Wales (  see  Dewi   ) and by two medieval kings of Scotland.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir David Hanmer was born in 1328, in Ellesmere, Flintshire, Wales, his father, Philip de Hanmer, was 29 and his mother, Agnes verch Dafydd, was 23. He had at least 3 sons and 3 daughters with Angharad Ferch Of Llewelyn Ddu. In 1383, at the age of 55, his occupation is listed as justice of the court of the king's bench. He died in 1388, in Hanmer, Flintshire, Wales, at the age of 60, and was buried in Ellesmere, Flintshire, Wales.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir David Hanmer est né en 1328, à Ellesmere, Flintshire, Galles, son père, Philip de Hanmer, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Agnes verch Dafydd, avait 23 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles avec Angharad Ferch Of Llewelyn Ddu. En 1383, à l’âge de 55 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est justice of the court of the king's bench. Il est décédé en 1388, à Hanmer, Flintshire, Galles, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterré à Ellesmere, Flintshire, Galles.

de.Maelor Saesneg, Flintshire, Wales, Unite: Maelor Saesneg, Flintshire, Wales, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir David Hanmer 1328 in Ellesmere, Flintshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Philip de Hanmer 29 und seine Mutter Agnes verch Dafydd 23. Er hatte mit Angharad Ferch Of Llewelyn Ddu mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. 1383, als er 55 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als justice of the court of the king's bench aufgeführt. Er starb 1388 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Hanmer, Flintshire, Wales und wurde in Ellesmere, Flintshire, Wales begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir David Hanmer è nato il nel 1328 nel Ellesmere, Flintshire, Galles, il suo padre, Philip de Hanmer, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Agnes verch Dafydd, aveva 23 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie con Angharad Ferch Of Llewelyn Ddu. Nel 1383, all'età di 55 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come justice of the court of the king's bench. Morì nel 1388, nel Hanmer, Flintshire, Galles, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolto a Ellesmere, Flintshire, Galles.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir David Hanmerが1328年にウェールズフリントシュアイアエレスメアで生まれた時，父Philip de Hanmerは29歳，母Agnes verch Dafyddは23歳であった。彼はAngharad Ferch Of Llewelyn Dduとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。1383年，55歳の時，職業はjustice of the court of the king's benchと記録されている。彼は1388年にウェールズフリントシュアイアハンマーで60歳で死去し，ウェールズフリントシュアイアエレスメアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir David Hanmer(이)가 1328년 웨일스 플린츠히르 엘레스머에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Philip de Hanmer(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes verch Dafydd(은)는 23세였다. 그는 Angharad Ferch Of Llewelyn Ddu(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1383년, 55세의 나이로 그의 직업은 justice of the court of the king's bench이었다. 그는 1388년 웨일스 플린츠히르 핸머에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 웨일스 플린츠히르 엘레스머에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir David Hanmer nasceu em 1328, em Ellesmere, Flintshire, Gales, seu pai, Philip de Hanmer, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Agnes verch Dafydd, tinha 23 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas com Angharad Ferch Of Llewelyn Ddu. Em 1383, com 55 anos, sua profissão aparece como justice of the court of the king's bench. Ele faleceu em 1388, em Hanmer, Flintshire, Gales, com 60 anos, e foi sepultado em Ellesmere, Flintshire, Gales.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir David Hanmer родился в 1328 г. в местности эллесмир, флинцхир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Philip de Hanmer было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes verch Dafydd, 23. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери от Angharad Ferch Of Llewelyn Ddu. В 1383 году, в возрасте 55 лет,  он работал по профессии justice of the court of the king's bench. Он умер в 1388 г. в местности ханмир, флинцхир, Уэльс в возрасте 60 лет и был похоронен в местности эллесмир, флинцхир, Уэльс.

Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas con Angharad Ferch Of Llewelyn Ddu. En 1383, a la edad de 55 años, su ocupación registrada era justice of the court of the king's bench. Murió en 1388, en Hanmer, Flintshire, Gales, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultado en Ellesmere, Flintshire, Gales.
